# fixtures/python

Test fixtures for Python syntax rules.

Each subdirectory corresponds to one builtin Python rule and contains a `match.py` file (expected to produce findings) and a `no_match.py` file (expected to produce zero findings). Rules covered: `python/bare-except`, `python/breakpoint`, `python/module-assign`, `python/mutable-default-arg`, `python/print-debug`, `python/tuple-return`.
